mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item (sku, name, category, unit, barcode, sale_price, image_url, created_at) VALUES (#{sku}, #{name}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{barcode}, #{salePrice}, #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.example.product.handler.StringListTypeHandler}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET sku = #{sku}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, barcode = #{barcode}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, image_url = #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.example.product.handler.StringListTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item ORDER BY created_at DESC
